title: 23:23 â October 4, 2023
body_text:
23:23 â October 4, 2023
Wires Part Update
We updated the Wires Part to reflect changes related to the migration of wires to the new wires platform.
â¢
Wires created on Saturday and destined for another Wires participating financial institution now appear in the Pending Incoming wires list the following business day. Settlement continues to be processed the following business day.
â¢
Wire processing fees are now billed at month end.
We also made some editorial changes throughout the Part.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.7, Wires Document Library
We added a link to the Prohibited Remittance Content Procedure.
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added definitions for ISO2022 and Lynx.
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
We updated content about wire fees to reflect the change to month-end billing for wire processing fees.
Section 4.2, Description of Wires Customizable Elements
We updated content about wire fees to reflect the change to month-end billing for wire processing fees.
Section 14.7, Outgoing Wires Created on Saturdays
We updated the section to reflect the change in wires created on Saturdays.
Section 16.7, Completing the Payment Details Section
We added information about enriched payment information and reference to the Prohibited Remittance Content Procedure.
Section 17.4, Completing the Wire Amount Section
We updated content related to wire fees to reflect the change to month-end billing for Central 1 wire processing fees (including figures).
Section 17.5, Completing the Payment Details Section
We added information about enriched payment information and reference to the Prohibited Remittance Content Procedure.
Section 17.7, Confirming the Foreign Exchange Quote
We updated figures that included Central 1 wire processing fees.
Section 19.3, Viewing Wire Details
We updated figures that included Central 1 wire processing fees.
Section 20.4, Printing a Submitted Wire Receipt
We updated figures that included Central 1 wire processing fees.
Section 24.5, Accepting Incoming Wires
We updated figures that included Central 1 wire processing fees.
Section 24.7, Returning Incoming Wires
We removed references to Central 1 wire processing fees from the Amount section. We also updated figures that included Central 1 wire processing fees.
Section 26.2, Settlement of Outgoing Wires
We updated content related to wire fees to reflect the change to month-end billing for Central 1 wire processing fees.
Section 26.3, Settlement of Incoming Wires
We updated content related to wire fees to reflect the change to month-end billing for Central 1 wire processing fees.
